option.hit: clangd: Preprocess and obfuscate current TU

option.name: tu
option.hit: clangd: Preprocess and obfuscate current TU

option.name: always
option.hit: Always show clangd completion results from inside namespaces

option.name: clangd
option.hit: Always show clangd completion results from inside namespaces

option.hit: Always show clangd completion results from inside namespaces

option.hit: Always show clangd completion results from inside namespaces

option.name: results
option.hit: Always show clangd completion results from inside namespaces

option.name: show
option.hit: Always show clangd completion results from inside namespaces

option.name: and
option.hit: Show errors and warnings from clangd

option.name: clangd
option.hit: Show errors and warnings from clangd

option.hit: Show errors and warnings from clangd

option.name: from
option.hit: Show errors and warnings from clangd

option.name: show
option.hit: Show errors and warnings from clangd

option.name: warnings

option.name: also
option.hit: Use clang-tidy via clangd (also enables some CLion builtin inspections)

option.name: use
option.hit: Use clang-tidy via clangd (also enables some CLion builtin inspections)

option.name: via
option.hit: Use clang-tidy via clangd (also enables some CLion builtin inspections)
Note: Clang-Tidy of version 7.0.0 or higher is supported
